blended.narrative: Apex Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,939 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.6" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
